config_template.output_tensor: optional preallocated output of same shape

applicability_notes: Elementwise unary sign. Golden registered as torch.sign. Supports optional preallocated output_tensor and queue_id (seen in unit test). No fusion-specific weight transform; layout must be TILE for eltwise unary kernels.

placement_observations.source: unit_test: data_gen_with_range(input_shapes, -10, 10, device) -> default DRAM interleaved, TILE layout
unit_test: preallocated output_tensor via data_gen_with_range, passed as output_tensor= kwarg
